sections.paragraph:
m. (from the root עָנָה)-

(1) reply, answer, Job 32:3, Job 32:5 Pro 15:1, 23 Pro 15:23hence-(a) hearing and answering of prayers, Pro 16:1.-(b) contradiction, refutation, Job 32:3, Job 32:5.

(2) purpose, intent, whence the abbreviated מַעַן. Pro 16:4 compare Arab. غى to purpose.
